title: Enel Crushes the Resistance
description: Enel uses his power to dominate the survivors, showing that ordinary resistance cannot stop a god made of lightning.
scene: Across pages 14, 15, 16, 17, this scene centers on Enel, Gan Fall, Eneru, Luffy, Nami. Enel uses his power to dominate the survivors, showing that ordinary resistance cannot stop a god made of lightning.

dialogue.speaker: Enel
dialogue.text: enel-sama. This is the old god...

dialogue.speaker: Gan Fall
dialogue.text: What should we do with him?

dialogue.speaker: Eneru
dialogue.text: Yahaha... this shrine is pretty nice...

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: wait.. They are my follow- ers...!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Most likely the goro goro fruit....!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: How can we win against that...?

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: It is now the predicted time...

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Yahahaha, good job surviving this far!!

summary: Enel uses his power to dominate the survivors, showing that ordinary resistance cannot stop a god made of lightning.
